name_en: 🆕Top-tier Original M69797 Beige This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram Empreinte calfskin, highlighting the color contrast of the embossed Monogram pattern. The compact shape features a wide opening for easy access and can be easily slipped into a handbag or pocket.
name_cn:
🆕Top-tier Original M69797 Beige This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram Empreinte calfskin, highlighting the color contrast of the embossed Monogram pattern. The compact shape features a wide opening for easy access and can be easily slipped into a handbag or pocket.
Detailed Features
11.0 x 8.5 x 2.0 cm
(L x H x W)
Monogram Empreinte embossed grained calfskin
Calfskin lining
Metal hardware
Zipper closure
Large accordion pocket
Interior patch pocket
Billfold compartment
Card slots
